steps.name: Given  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
Then  Account 'LYRASIS Reads' is present on Accounts screen
When  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
Then  Login is performed successfully
When  I open Catalog
When  I switch to 'Audiobooks' catalog tab
And  I open 'New BiblioBoard Test' category
And  Change books visibility to show AVAILABLE_NOW
And  Click GET action button on random book from the catalog book screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Save book name of the book 'bookInfo' as 'bookNameInfo' on catalog book screen
Then  I check that book 'bookNameInfo' contains LISTEN action button on catalog book screen
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Button LISTEN is not displayed
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.CatalogBooksSteps.isBookContainBtn(CatalogBooksSteps.java:61)
	at ✽.I check that book 'bookNameInfo' contains LISTEN action button on catalog book screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/AudiobookLyrasis.feature:447)

steps.name: When  Open book with LISTEN action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
When  Select 2X playback speed on playback speed audiobook screen
Then  Current playback speed value is 2X on audio player screen
When  Return to previous screen from audio player screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
And  Current playback speed value is 2X on audio player screen
When  I restart app
And  I open Books
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with LISTEN action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo on books screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
And  Current playback speed value is 2X on audio player screen
When  Tap play button on audio player screen
And  Save book play time as 'timeAhead' on audio player screen
And  Wait for 5 seconds
Then  Playback has been moved forward by 10 seconds from 'timeAhead' seconds on audio player screen
